provides.name: duration
provides.reads: endTime and startTime and (endTime - startTime)/1000 or 0

inputs.name: avoidancetotalpercent
inputs.reads: 0.04 * ( UnitDefense('player') + select(2,UnitDefense('player') ) - UnitLevel('player')*5 ) + GetDodgeChance() + GetParryChance() + GetBlockChance()

_meta.note: provides/internal fields are source-only (captures are blind to them); exact-spell-name is our-policy OFF (match-family-not-rank)
